codeReview.summary: Reviewed the fix commit plus the original failed diffs (`a45fe4e55b203474ea7cfdcbf1d6d8799b7795e6`, `b5f75b25bf81618306437fbbf8d130bdb88ac4e1`). The remote-elision assertion now uses persisted runtime transition history (`transition_history`) instead of sampled snapshots, and the invariant orphan-process check is expanded to scan harness-owned mitmdump/tuistory/setup/fake-bin scope plus HOME-scoped descendants while excluding the known live mitm fixture PID. This adequately resolves both prior blocking scrutiny failures.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission lint coverage still excludes `tests/tuistory`, even though this fix modifies tuistory test files.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/services.yaml:28 defines `lint` as `ruff check cc_sentiment/tui tests/test_tui.py`; this fix changes `client/tests/tuistory/setup/test_resilience.py` and `client/tests/tuistory/setup/test_invariants.py`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The new transition-history handoff contract between SetupScreen and the tuistory harness is implemented but not captured in shared library notes.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Implementation uses `CC_SENTIMENT_TRANSITION_HISTORY_PATH` and writes/reads `.transition-history.json` (`client/cc_sentiment/tui/screens/setup.py:913-918`, `client/tests/tuistory/bin/run_scenario.sh:34,95`, `client/tests/tuistory/driver.py:262-277`), while `.factory/library/tuistory-harness.md` has no `transition_history` mention.

summary: Pass: the fix feature directly addresses the two prior scrutiny blockers (remote-stage inference via sampled snapshots and narrow orphan-process scope) and the updated assertions now align with the intended contracts.
